notes: Added mobile-only app-like public layer for home, company overview, business areas, representative project/infrastructure area, and notices.
Added mobile bottom navigation for home, company, business, projects, and notices.
Uses existing public content and noticePublicData subscription; no duplicate store or API was introduced.
No inquiry, quote, consultation, or contact CTA was added.
Added mobile-only admin overview layer using existing auth session, image count, notice count, activity logs, and section navigation.
Added mobile admin dock for dashboard, notices, images, settings, and logs.
Desktop admin shell remains available above mobile breakpoint.
Fixed mobile notice form panel width and form actions so submit buttons remain inside 390px viewport.
Admin login gate remained active before auth; admin body hidden before login after deployed logout smoke.
Existing demo fallback login dgtc66 / 1234 remained functional.
Notice create to public notice reflection smoke passed in preview.
Public notice list/detail route remained functional.
